resources: Dukan location Enter address and pick dukan location on map Address Location Reset Upload another image Click to upload Dukan image Upload dukan image, it should be rectangle 9:16 aspect ratio Image (9:16) Create New Dukan Upload dukan image, it should be rectangle 9:16 aspect ratio Create Next add shopping basket Style has image Customize your dukan Pick color and style for dukan Color Style Wide image with list products Small image with grid products No dukan image Color size Style has small image icon Save Enter your dukan information Fill name and select the dukan category Dukan name Enter dukan name Category Alert You can choose up to 3 categories Please select at least 1 category You can select maximum 3 categories Error Success Dukan name already exists, try with another one. Back Arrow My Dukan Creating your dukan %s request is pending now Waiting until it be approved and add your shelves directly! Delete Dismiss Manage shelf Create shelf Title Shelf title Create Shelf name can only contain letters, spaces, and ‘-’ Shelf name already exists, try another one. Shelf name not changed, try another one. Failed to create shelf create dukan request is approved now Start creating your shelf and products by clicking on create button below Delete Icon Foreground Image Blur Image Shelves Checkout Add shelf successfully. Failed to add shelf Create dukan request it approved now Start create you shelf and products by click on create button below! This shelf is empty Start adding your products to shelf by click on add button above! Add product Edit shelf" This shelf is empty" Products Delete shelf successfully. Delete shelf Are you sure you want to delete this shelf? Unable to Delete Shelf This shelf has a products inside it, you can’t delete it until remove products. Error deleting shelf Shelf name is invalid.Only letters, spaces, and hyphens are allowed. Shelf name already exists %1$d products Something went wrong Dukan dukan button dukan icon add dukan icon Product image Edit Product Pencil Koin Icon Discount Icon Add Product name shelf Price Price after discount Description Image (1:1) One selection for each product Add product successfully. %1$d MB You can upload a maximum of 10 images. Image size should be less than 5 MB. Upload failed, please try again. Something went wrong, please try again. Price is invalid. Price must be greater than 0.0. Description must be between 25 and 3000 letters. All arrow right icon Best Selling shopping basket icon favorite icon share icon remove_product Product removed successfully Dukan Image Product Image Discount Icon Dukan creation failed" Invalid image format" Oops! It looks like you’re offline. Check your connection and try again Re-try Warning Image Wifi Image Best Dukans around you Editor Pick Dukans what do you need? Categories Back to main screen icon Category Icon Something went wrong while fetching categories No Internet Connection View more Heart Icon Favorites There is no dukan related to this category! It will appear here when it added. Error editing shelf Edit shelf successfully. You cannot use the same name as the current shelf. Add to cart Product thumbnail Cart Go to checkout Sub total price From dukan Dukan Management isn’t available right now. Please try again later! Please wait until loading is complete... Oops! The Dukan Main Screen is currently unavailable. Please check back soon. It will appear here once it's available. Confirm order Deliver to Summary details Manage product Product saved successfully. Product name already exists, try another one. Failed to update product. Please try again. Product not found. You are not authorized to edit this product. Product deleted successfully. Failed to delete product. Please try again. Delete product Are you sure you want to delete this product? Silver tier icon Edit address icon Added to favorites Removed from favorites Could not update favorites Search in dukans... Search Icon Start searching! Enter word from a specific dukan or product to view it. Dukans No results found! Please try again with another keyword. Something went wrong while searching. Please try again in a moment. Checkout Feature This feature is not implemented yet. Back to dukan screen icon Product is out of stock Price after discount bigger than base price Shop Now Get discount for every order, only valid for today. %1$s% DISCOUNT\nToday special Out of stock Sold out Order #%1$d Order Date Icon Product of Order Image Total amount Discount Platform fees Customer Information Profile Icon You are not authorized to display this order details. Order not found. Failed to load order details. Please try again. dukan is deactivated Your dukan has been deactivated because: Wrong information provided. No active location found ...SeeMore .SeeLess Remove product from cart We already have one with the same quantity Confirm
